servinfo.title: OBD System Description
servinfo.ptxt: For CVT control system, TCM has the following functions.

item.ptxt: When ignition is ON with no malfunction in CVT control system detected, transmission warning light (1) lights for about 2 seconds and then goes OFF for bulb check.
When TCM detects a malfunction in CVT control system, it indicates transmission warning light and stores DTC in its memory.
TCM stores the malfunction area in TCM memory as a DTC according to SAE J2012.
If TCM judges that the system is normal for 3 driving cycles continuously after detecting a malfunction, it makes transmission warning light turn OFF although DTC stored in its memory will remain.

Not only SUZUKI scan tool (2) but also CAN communication OBD generic scan tool, which are compliant with SAE J1978, can communicate with TCM via DLC (3), i.e., diagnostic information can be accessed using the scan tool.
For information about the following items, refer to OBD System Description .
